title: Special columns are not handled properly with prewhere in ReadFromMergeTree
poc:
CREATE TABLE test_replacing_mt_with_is_deleted(
  key Int64,
  someCol String,
  ver UInt64,
  is_deleted UInt8
) ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(ver, is_deleted)
ORDER BY key;

CREATE TABLE test_versioned_collapsing_mt(
  key Int64,
  someCol String,
  sign Int8,
  ver UInt64
) ENGINE = VersionedCollapsingMergeTree(sign, ver)
ORDER BY key;
key_bug_features: Special columns not handled in PREWHERE with ReadFromMergeTree
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_special_columns(key Int64, value String, timestamp DateTime, is_active UInt8) ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(timestamp) ORDER BY key;
SELECT key, value FROM test_special_columns FINAL PREWHERE is_active = 1 AND timestamp > '2023-01-01 00:00:00' ORDER BY key;
SELECT count() FROM test_special_columns FINAL PREWHERE is_active = 0;
